dimensions.name: Scope Compliance
dimensions.level_1: Files changed outside allowlist, or existing contracts broken.
dimensions.level_3: Allowlist mostly respected but one minor deviation exists.
dimensions.level_5: Exactly the files in allowlist were touched. Zero scope breach.

dimensions.name: Invariant Preservation
dimensions.level_1: One or more spec invariants broken in implementation.
dimensions.level_3: Invariants preserved but adversarial cases not tested.
dimensions.level_5: All spec invariants preserved and adversarial tests verify each one.

dimensions.name: Test Adequacy
dimensions.level_1: Tests absent or only happy-path covered.
dimensions.level_3: AC covered but adversarial cases missing.
dimensions.level_5: All AC mapped to tests including adversarial, aliasing, and duplicate cases.

dimensions.name: Runtime Readiness
dimensions.level_1: Code cannot run; missing files, syntax errors, or broken prerequisites.
dimensions.level_3: Code runs but focused verification not attempted.
dimensions.level_5: Focused verification passed; regression gate attempted.

dimensions.name: Regression Risk
dimensions.level_3: Existing tests untouched but regression gate not verified.
dimensions.level_5: Regression gate explicitly run and passed. 0 failures in existing suite.
